mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member_token WHERE is_revoked = true OR expires_at < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, kakao_id FROM member WHERE user_status = 'WITHDRAWN' AND is_kakao_unlinked = false AND deleted_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET is_kakao_unlinked = true, role = 'WITHDRAWN' WHERE user_status = 'WITHDRAWN' AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member WHERE is_kakao_unlinked = true AND user_status = 'WITHDRAWN' AND deleted_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
